body:
## Problem
Generic "Processing..." message doesn't inform the user of actual progress.

## Impact
- Perceived slowness
- Lack of system status visibility (Heuristic #4)

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement a multi-stage progress bar for PDF export
- [ ] Update progress states: "Analyzing Data," "Building Layout," "Generating PDF"
- [ ] Add a "Cancel" button to stop the generation process
- [ ] Ensure `aria-live` announcements for screen reader users during the wait
title: [UX-06] Enhance PDF Generation Progress Feedback
